renamed.name: house_wood_medium_brown_a
renamed.label: Wooden medium house, brown roof
renamed.notes: Strong candidate for generic village housing.

renamed.name: house_wood_medium_brown_b
renamed.label: Wooden medium house, brown roof alt
renamed.notes: Very close to asset 002; useful as an alternate house silhouette.

renamed.name: cave_entrance_mossy_a
renamed.label: Mossy cave entrance
renamed.notes: Good landmark candidate for mine or starter cave.

renamed.name: house_wood_small_straw_a
renamed.label: Small wooden house, straw roof
renamed.notes: Reads clearly for starter-town housing.

renamed.name: house_wood_small_tan_a
renamed.label: Small wooden house, tan roof
renamed.notes: Useful alternate house with distinct warm roof.

renamed.name: hanging_sign_small_a
renamed.label: Small hanging sign
renamed.notes: Useful for shop entrances or interactable markers.

renamed.name: torch_standing_a
renamed.label: Standing torch A
renamed.notes: Clear silhouette and safe gameplay readability.

renamed.name: fence_straight_short_a
renamed.label: Short straight fence
renamed.notes: Good module for village boundaries.

renamed.name: fence_diagonal_right_a
renamed.label: Diagonal fence right
renamed.notes: Pairs well with straight fence sections.

renamed.name: fence_straight_long_a
renamed.label: Long straight fence
renamed.notes: Useful larger run for village borders.

renamed.name: rock_cluster_small_a
renamed.label: Small rock cluster
renamed.notes: Can support mine dressing, but not a first runtime priority.

renamed.name: torch_standing_b
renamed.label: Standing torch B
renamed.notes: Alternate torch variant for repetition control.

renamed.name: signpost_standing_a
renamed.label: Standing signpost
renamed.notes: Readable, even if slightly stylized.

renamed.name: well_stone_wood_a
renamed.label: Stone village well
renamed.notes: One of the strongest village props from the set.

renamed.name: weapon_rack_sword_a
renamed.label: Sword rack
renamed.notes: Strong fit near blacksmith or training area.

renamed.name: forge_clutter_station_a
renamed.label: Forge clutter station
renamed.notes: Useful as blacksmith dressing, though visually busy.

renamed.name: signpost_tall_a
renamed.label: Tall signpost
renamed.notes: Functional, but secondary compared to the cleaner signs.

renamed.name: tool_rig_blue_a
renamed.label: Blue tool rig
renamed.notes: Readable as workshop equipment, but identity is less certain.

renamed.name: map_open_table_a
renamed.label: Open map or document
renamed.notes: Useful as ambient detail, not a first-pass runtime asset.

renamed.name: bench_wood_a
renamed.label: Wooden bench
renamed.notes: Clean village prop with clear silhouette.

renamed.name: crates_stacked_double_a
renamed.label: Double stacked crates
renamed.notes: Safe utility prop for stores, docks, or yards.

renamed.name: barrel_large_a
renamed.label: Large barrel
renamed.notes: Core village storage prop.

renamed.name: crate_single_a
renamed.label: Single crate
renamed.notes: Core small utility prop.

renamed.name: crate_drawer_small_a
renamed.label: Small crate drawer
renamed.notes: Useful but more specific than the generic crate.

renamed.name: barrel_small_a
renamed.label: Small barrel
renamed.notes: Good size variation for storage dressing.

renamed.name: firewood_bundle_a
renamed.label: Firewood bundle
renamed.notes: Good ambient prop, but less essential than storage/landmark items.

renamed.name: notice_board_small_a
renamed.label: Small notice board
renamed.notes: Useful social-town prop near plaza or NPCs.

renamed.name: signpost_cross_small_a
renamed.label: Small cross signpost
renamed.notes: Secondary sign option; keep for variety.

renamed.name: lantern_hanging_a
renamed.label: Hanging lantern
renamed.notes: Strong utility/lighting prop.

renamed.name: signpost_cross_large_a
renamed.label: Large cross signpost
renamed.notes: Useful directional signage for outdoor paths.

renamed.name: pickaxe_ground_a
renamed.label: Ground pickaxe
renamed.notes: Good mining or smithing decoration.

renamed.name: barrel_small_b
renamed.label: Small barrel B
renamed.notes: Very close to barrel_small_a; keep as variant.

renamed.name: anvil_small_a
renamed.label: Small anvil
renamed.notes: Excellent blacksmith prop.

renamed.name: barrel_small_c
renamed.label: Small barrel C
renamed.notes: Close to the other barrel variants; not needed in first runtime pass.

renamed.name: barrel_small_d
renamed.label: Small barrel D
renamed.notes: Another storage variation kept for fallback only.
